groundCoupledCheck._note: BASESIMP whole-box WIRE check (Session 79, Stage 1). The Session-78 per-surface Model-B math is gone; __verifyFixture now drives the adapter with synthetic enumerations. infiltrationCheck._note: Interim whole-building block-load infiltration (raw ACH50) + shared-temperature-seam consistency (#134/#135). Synthetic enumerations (NOT the fixture). Volume = footprint 100 m² × conditioned height 6 m = 600 m³. deltaT = ti 21 − toh −20 = 41 °C. infiltrationW = 600 × (3.0/3600) × 1200 J/(m³·K) × 41 = 24600 W exactly. inf.i (#135): a ground call with ti-heating 21 differs in tiC AND engine load from a station-only call (default 22). inf.j (#134): a ground call with toh-override −20 differs in tohC AND engine load from station-only (dhdbt −33). Station Winnipeg|||MB.
